author: gaxanh
content: Does the exception to EIP-3651 (warm coinbase) implicitly apply to this EIP?

author: draganrakita
content: On top level i would say we dont want it, it is more problematic to support in txpool and it is niche usecase with not big impact or benefit. Coinbase (or block builder) is chosen pseudorandomly so it is hard to filter those, so you would always assume target is cold in txpool (as you dont have this info), and you could charge less when exeuction starts but having this diff is not worth the effort imo.

author: gaxanh
content: I mean, you should add something to clarify its interaction with this EIP.
